mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS review_id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, r.point, r.review_status, r.like_count, r.view_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.login_id,
re.id AS reaction_id, re.target_type AS re_target_type, re.target_id AS re_target_id, re.user_id AS re_user_id, re.type AS re_type, re.created_at AS re_created_at,
f.id AS file_id, f.target_type AS f_target_type, f.target_id AS f_target_id, f.file_path, f.file_size,
rep.id AS reply_id, rep.user_id AS rep_user_id, rep.content AS rep_content, rep.created_at AS rep_created_at, u2.login_id AS rep_login_id,
-- 장단점 분리 조인 pa.content AS pro_content, ca.content AS con_content
FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN reaction re ON r.id = re.target_id AND re.target_type = 'REVIEW' LEFT JOIN file f ON r.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'REVIEW' LEFT JOIN reply rep ON r.id = rep.target_id AND rep.target_type = 'REVIEW' LEFT JOIN user u2 ON rep.user_id = u2.id -- 장점(PRO) 조인 LEFT JOIN review_attribute pa ON r.id = pa.review_id AND pa.type = 'PRO' -- 단점(CON) 조인 LEFT JOIN review_attribute ca ON r.id = ca.review_id AND ca.type = 'CON'
WHERE r.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{userId}, #{point}, 'ACTIVE')

INSERT INTO review_attribute (review_id, type, content) VALUES
(#{reviewId}, #{type}, #{item})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, f.file_path AS filePath FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN file f ON r.id = f.target_id AND f.target_type = 'REVIEW' WHERE r.review_status = 'BANNED' ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE review_status = 'BANNED'
